scores.correctness_notes: Covers all key gold standard points: ContainerPath, LocalPath, PathProtocol, ensure_contents signature/return value, PebbleConnectionError, mode/user/group params, RelativePathError. Minor omission: doesn't mention comparison methods only work on same ops.Container.
scores.hallucination_notes: Several fabricated or extrapolated details not in gold standard: (1) multiple ContainerPath constructor forms with positional path segments and PurePath inputs, (2) read_text() newline normalisation to \n 'by default', (3) ensure_contents default mode stated as 0o644 (gold standard shows None with no default given), (4) LookupError for unknown user/group, (5) PermissionError example — none of these appear in the gold standard. The core API shape is accurate but these extras are unverified extrapolations.
